project: BE552 HW2 — Genetic Circuit Workflow Design

parts.function: Promoter responsive to arsenite ions, repressed by ArsR in the absence of arsenic

Arsenic-responsive transcriptional repressor. Dissociates from Pars in the presence of arsenite.

transcription_units.architecture: Pars Arsenic Sensing Promoter (promoter) → RBS B0034 (rbs) → ArsR Transcription Factor (regulator) → Double Terminator B0015 (terminator)

circuits.explanation:
## Arsenic Green Fluorescence Biosensor
**Pattern:** Biosensor
**Organism:** Escherichia coli

### Description
Biosensor that detects arsenic and produces green fluorescence

### Transcription Units
- **sensor**: Pars Arsenic Sensing Promoter -> RBS B0034 -> ArsR Transcription Factor -> Double Terminator B0015 (452 bp)
- **reporter**: GFP (Green Fluorescent Protein) (717 bp)

### Regulatory Connections
- sensor --[activates]--> regulator
- regulator --[activates]--> reporter

### Component Details
- **sensor** (promoter): Pars Arsenic Sensing Promoter -- Promoter responsive to arsenite ions, repressed by ArsR in the absence of arsenic
- **regulator** (regulator): ArsR Transcription Factor -- Arsenic-responsive transcriptional repressor. Dissociates from Pars in the presence of arsenite.
- **reporter** (reporter): GFP (Green Fluorescent Protein) -- Green fluorescent protein. Emits at 509 nm.

**Total construct:** ~1169 bp across 2 transcription unit(s)

damp_lab_workflow.variation_notes: Simple 2-TU biosensor; Gibson Assembly chosen for seamless joining of 2 fragments

operations.details: Amplify each transcription unit with Gibson-overlap primers (20-40 bp overlaps)
operations.template_DNA: iGEM DNA Distribution Kit plates or IDT gBlock synthesis
operations.primers: Design 20 bp binding + 20 bp overlap per junction

operations.details: Run PCR products on 1% agarose gel to verify correct band sizes
Monarch PCR & DNA Cleanup Kit (NEB) or gel extract if non-specific bands
Combine linearized pSB1C3 backbone + 2 TU inserts in Gibson Assembly Master Mix
operations.reagent: NEBuilder HiFi DNA Assembly Master Mix (NEB E2621)

operations.details: Heat-shock transform Gibson product into chemically competent E. coli DH5α
operations.protocol: Thaw on ice 10 min → add 2 µL assembly → ice 30 min → 42°C 30s → ice 5 min → 950 µL SOC → 37°C 1h → plate

operations.details: Screen 8-12 colonies with VF2/VR primers to verify insert
Isolate plasmid DNA from positive colonies
Induce with 0, 1, 5, 10, 50 µM sodium arsenite; measure GFP (ex485/em528) at 0, 2, 4, 6h

Medium-strength ribosome binding site.
Tet repressor. Binds tet operator and represses PLtet. Released by tetracycline/aTc.

Green fluorescent protein. Emits at 509 nm.
Double transcription terminator (BBa_B0010 + BBa_B0012).
Tetracycline-inducible promoter. Repressed by TetR; tetracycline or aTc releases TetR.
Medium-strength ribosome binding site.
Lac repressor protein. Binds lac operator and represses transcription. IPTG releases LacI.
Medium-strength ribosome binding site.

Double transcription terminator (BBa_B0010 + BBa_B0012).

transcription_units.architecture: PLlac/ara Promoter (promoter) → RBS B0034 (rbs) → TetR Repressor (repressor) → RBS B0034 (rbs) → GFP (Green Fluorescent Protein) (reporter) → Double Terminator B0015 (terminator)
PLtet Promoter (promoter) → RBS B0034 (rbs) → LacI Repressor (repressor) → RBS B0034 (rbs) → mRFP1 (Red Fluorescent Protein) (reporter) → Double Terminator B0015 (terminator)

circuits.explanation:
## Iptg/Tetracycline Toggle Switch
**Pattern:** Toggle Switch
**Organism:** Escherichia coli

### Description
Bistable toggle switch: IPTG drives state A (GFP), tetracycline drives state B (RFP)

### Transcription Units
- **promoter_a**: PLlac/ara Promoter -> RBS B0034 -> TetR Repressor -> RBS B0034 -> GFP (Green Fluorescent Protein) -> Double Terminator B0015 (1666 bp)
- **promoter_b**: PLtet Promoter -> RBS B0034 -> LacI Repressor -> RBS B0034 -> mRFP1 (Red Fluorescent Protein) -> Double Terminator B0015 (1977 bp)

### Regulatory Connections
- promoter_a --[activates]--> repressor_a
- promoter_a --[activates]--> reporter_a
- repressor_a --[represses]--> promoter_b
- promoter_b --[activates]--> repressor_b
- promoter_b --[activates]--> reporter_b
- repressor_b --[represses]--> promoter_a

### Component Details
- **promoter_a** (promoter): PLlac/ara Promoter -- IPTG-inducible promoter from the lac operon. Repressed by LacI, induced by IPTG.
- **repressor_a** (repressor): TetR Repressor -- Tet repressor. Binds tet operator and represses PLtet. Released by tetracycline/aTc.
- **reporter_a** (reporter): GFP (Green Fluorescent Protein) -- Green fluorescent protein. Emits at 509 nm.
- **promoter_b** (promoter): PLtet Promoter -- Tetracycline-inducible promoter. Repressed by TetR; tetracycline or aTc releases TetR.
- **repressor_b** (repressor): LacI Repressor -- Lac repressor protein. Binds lac operator and represses transcription. IPTG releases LacI.
- **reporter_b** (reporter): mRFP1 (Red Fluorescent Protein) -- Monomeric red fluorescent protein. Emits at 607 nm.

**Total construct:** ~3643 bp across 2 transcription unit(s)

damp_lab_workflow.backbone_vector: pSB1C3 or DVA level-1 destination vector
damp_lab_workflow.variation_notes: Multi-module toggle switch; Golden Gate chosen for scarless, ordered multi-part assembly of 6+ parts

operations.details: Check all parts for internal BsaI sites; remove by silent mutagenesis if found
operations.tool: Benchling or SnapGene for in-silico BsaI scan

operations.details: Add BsaI recognition sites + 4-nt fusion sites to each part
operations.fusion_standard: MoClo / PhytoBrick standard overhangs (GGAG, AATG, GCTT, etc.)

operations.details: One-pot restriction-ligation with BsaI + T4 ligase for each TU
Transform each TU-level assembly separately into DH5α
Combine TU-bearing plasmids via BsmBI Golden Gate into final backbone
Transform level-2 assembly into DH5α
Screen colonies; send positives for sequencing to confirm full construct
Isolate verified plasmid
Grow in LB; induce state A with 1 mM IPTG (expect GFP), wash, induce state B with 200 ng/mL aTc (expect RFP). Measure GFP (ex485/em528) and RFP (ex555/em607) over 8h
operations.instrument: BioTek Synergy plate reader or flow cytometer

transcription_units.architecture: PLlacIq Promoter (promoter) → RBS B0034 (rbs) → GFP (Green Fluorescent Protein) (reporter) → Double Terminator B0015 (terminator)

circuits.explanation:
## NOT Gate (IPTG)
**Pattern:** Logic Not
**Organism:** Escherichia coli

### Description
Inverter: output (GFP) is ON when IPTG is absent, OFF when present

### Transcription Units
- **output_promoter**: PLlacIq Promoter -> RBS B0034 -> GFP (Green Fluorescent Protein) -> Double Terminator B0015 (932 bp)
- **input_promoter**: PLlac/ara Promoter -> RBS B0034 -> LacI Repressor -> Double Terminator B0015 (1405 bp)

### Regulatory Connections
- input_promoter --[activates]--> inverter_repressor
- inverter_repressor --[represses]--> output_promoter
- output_promoter --[activates]--> output_reporter

### Component Details
- **input_promoter** (promoter): PLlac/ara Promoter -- IPTG-inducible promoter from the lac operon. Repressed by LacI, induced by IPTG.
- **inverter_repressor** (repressor): LacI Repressor -- Lac repressor protein. Binds lac operator and represses transcription. IPTG releases LacI.
- **output_promoter** (promoter): PLlacIq Promoter -- Hybrid lac/tet promoter. Repressed by LacI, induced by IPTG.
- **output_reporter** (reporter): GFP (Green Fluorescent Protein) -- Green fluorescent protein. Emits at 509 nm.

**Total construct:** ~2337 bp across 2 transcription unit(s)

damp_lab_workflow.variation_notes: Logic inverter; same Gibson method as Circuit 1 but different circuit topology and different assay (dose-response transfer function)

operations.details: Amplify TUs with Gibson-overlap primers
operations.template_DNA: iGEM Distribution Kit or IDT gBlocks

operations.details: 1% agarose gel; verify PCR product sizes
Digest template DNA with DpnI (NEB R0176) 1h @ 37°C to remove original plasmid
Monarch PCR & DNA Cleanup Kit (NEB T1030)
Assemble linearized backbone + inserts
operations.reagent: NEBuilder HiFi DNA Assembly Master Mix (NEB E2621)

operations.details: Heat-shock into DH5α competent cells
Screen colonies with VF2/VR; send positives for Sanger sequencing
Isolate plasmid from sequence-verified colony
Measure GFP output across IPTG gradient: 0, 0.01, 0.1, 0.5, 1, 5, 10 mM IPTG. Expect HIGH GFP at 0 IPTG (inverter ON) and LOW GFP at high IPTG (inverter OFF). Plot transfer function curve.
